entries.source: data interpretation AI
entries.value: डेटा व्याख्या AI

entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: डेटा इन्टरप्रेटर

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: data, chart descriptions, वा results paste गर्नुहोस् र तिनको अर्थ के हो, के होइन, र अब के सोध्ने सिक्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Data Interpreter prompts र study loop

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates र summaries महत्त्वपूर्ण हुन्छन्, तर learners लाई अक्सर human situation भित्र पस्ने बाटो चाहिन्छ: मानिसहरूले के विश्वास गर्थे, उनीहरूले के choices देख्थे, कुन limits ले उनीहरूलाई आकार दियो, र उनीहरूले के थाहा पाउन सक्दैनथे।

entries.value: कुनै पनि विषयमा बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.value: Debate any topic prompts र study loop

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: कुनै पनि विषयमा बहस गर्नुहोस्, चुनौती पाउनुहोस्, दाबीहरूको तुलना गर्नुहोस् र अझ बलियो तर्क कसरी गर्ने सिक्नुहोस्।

entries.value: causes र consequences मा debate गर्नुहोस्

entries.value: ग्रेटा थनबर्गसँग जलवायु नीतिमा बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: बहसले दाबी, प्रमाण, मूल्य र अनुमान छुट्याउन मद्दत गर्छ, जसले ऐतिहासिक व्याख्या अझ सटीक बनाउँछ।

entries.source: Debate justice with Batman
entries.value: ब्याटम्यानसँग न्यायको बारेमा बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate modes that help learners make claims, face counterarguments, and improve reasoning under pressure.
entries.value: learners लाई claims बनाउन, counterarguments सामना गर्न, र pressure मा reasoning improve गर्न मद्दत गर्ने debate modes।

entries.source: Debate the claim
entries.value: दाबीमा बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: अनुमान, tradeoffs र कमजोर प्रमाण देख्न सकियोस् भनेर दाबीलाई एकभन्दा बढी पक्षबाट बहस गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: यो ऐतिहासिक वा दार्शनिक दाबीलाई दुवै पक्षबाट बहस गर्नुहोस्। प्रमाण, अनुमान र मूल्य छुट्याउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Debate through a chosen voice
entries.value: छनौट गरिएको आवाजमार्फत बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: व्यक्तित्वसँग बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: AI प्रयोग गरेर Personality सँग Debate

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: AI प्रयोग गरेर Personality सँग Debate निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: कुनै real वा fictional personality को नाम दिनुहोस् र कुनै पनि topic मा उनीहरूसँग debate गर्नुहोस्। AI ले debate fair राख्दै उनीहरूको public style र worldview channel गर्छ।

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: AI प्रयोग गरेर Personality सँग Debate: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: debate with AI
entries.value: AI सँग debate

entries.value: debug code मद्दत

entries.value: mistake debug गर्नुहोस्

entries.value: Deccan Business कभरेज

entries.value: पूर्वनिर्धारित guest शिक्षक

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: term define गर्नुहोस्;

entries.source: Define badges, evidence requirements, tiers, and reflection prompts.
entries.value: badges, evidence requirements, tiers, र reflection prompts define गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Define rules, milestones, review checkpoints, and recovery steps.
entries.value: rules, milestones, review checkpoints, र recovery steps define गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Define terms, test examples, compare views, and invite the learner's position.
entries.value: terms define गर्नुहोस्, examples test गर्नुहोस्, views compare गर्नुहोस्, र learner को position invite गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Define the deadline and scope
entries.value: deadline र scope define गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Define the goal
entries.value: लक्ष्य निर्धारण गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Define, show examples, ask the learner to use words, and review missed items.
entries.value: define गर्नुहोस्, examples देखाउनुहोस्, learner लाई words प्रयोग गर्न लगाउनुहोस्, र missed items review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Definitions
entries.value: Definitions

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: धेरै broad वा obvious cards delete गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Delhi, 1857
Deployment path
entries.value: तैनाती मार्ग

entries.source: Describe or paste details from an image and get help reading diagrams, charts, problems, handwritten notes, or visual evidence.
entries.value: छविबाट विवरणहरू वर्णन गर्नुहोस् वा टाँस्नुहोस् र रेखाचित्रहरू, चार्टहरू, समस्याहरू, हस्तलिखित नोटहरू, वा दृश्य प्रमाणहरू पढ्न मद्दत प्राप्त गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Describe the image or paste what is visible
entries.value: छविको वर्णन गर्नुहोस् वा के देखिन्छ त्यो टाँस्नुहोस्

entries.source: Design a class leaderboard
entries.value: कक्षाको लिडरबोर्ड डिजाइन गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Design a plant growth experiment
entries.value: बिरुवाको वृद्धि प्रयोग डिजाइन गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Design a points, levels, quests, and rewards system around real learning progress.
entries.value: वास्तविक सिकाइ प्रगतिको वरिपरि अंक, स्तर, खोज र पुरस्कार प्रणाली डिजाइन गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Design a revision sprint
entries.value: रिभिजन स्प्रिन्ट डिजाइन गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Design a tiny daily review
entries.value: सानो दैनिक समीक्षाको योजना बनाउनुहोस्

entries.source: Design cues, reduce friction, track attempts, and recover from misses.
entries.value: design cues, friction reduce गर्नुहोस्, attempts track गर्नुहोस्, र misses बाट recover गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Design leaderboards that motivate without distorting learning.
entries.value: learning distort नगरी motivate गर्ने leaderboards design गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Design levels for coding practice
entries.value: कोडिङ अभ्यासका लागि स्तरहरू डिजाइन गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Design meaningful achievement systems for learning.
entries.value: learning का लागि meaningful achievement systems design गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Designed for confidence
entries.value: आत्मविश्वासका लागि डिजाइन गरिएको

entries.source: Diagnose and repair misconceptions.
entries.value: misconceptions diagnose र repair गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Diagnose, suggest revisions, invite learner choice, and iterate.
entries.value: diagnose गर्नुहोस्, revisions suggest गर्नुहोस्, learner choice invite गर्नुहोस्, र iterate गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: diagram labeling
entries.value: diagram लेबलिङ

entries.source: Diagram Labeling Practice
entries.value: चित्र लेबल गर्ने अभ्यास

entries.source: Did the AI check your reasoning instead of simply replacing it?
entries.value: AI ले simply replace गर्नुको सट्टा तपाईंको reasoning check गर्यो?

entries.source: Did you answer at least one question before reading the correction?
entries.value: correction पढ्नु अघि तपाईंले कम्तीमा एउटा question answer गर्नुभयो?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: फरक jobs लाई फरक modes चाहिन्छ: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, र अझ धेरै।

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक flows चाहिन्छ। hints का लागि homework coach, problem solving का लागि math step coach, deep understanding का लागि Socratic tutor, recall का लागि flashcards, र pressure-tested practice का लागि quizzes प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक interaction shapes चाहिन्छ, त्यसैले inspir ले active, mode-specific teaching प्रयोग गर्छ। homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, र writing critique एउटै generic chat जस्तो behave गर्नु हुँदैन।

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक shapes चाहिन्छ: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, र study planning।

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: फरक मानिसहरूलाई फरक AI learning routes चाहिन्छ।

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: अनुमति नभएको

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Warranty को Disclaimer

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Data को Disclosure

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: तपाईंलाई सुहाउने बाटोहरू पत्ता लगाउनुहोस्

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: तपाईंलाई मिल्ने paths discover गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Discovery

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: content public भएको ठाउँमा discovery खुला हुन्छ।

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: भाषा विकल्पहरू बन्द गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: offline बाट सुरु भएको distribution

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: diverge गर्नुहोस्, cluster गर्नुहोस्, choose गर्नुहोस्, refine गर्नुहोस्, र idea लाई actionable बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: Copyright Infringement Claims का लागि DMCA Notice र Procedure

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: के मलाई अब के practice गर्ने थाहा छ?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: सुधारिएको अनुच्छेद किन राम्रो भयो भनेर व्याख्या गर्न नसकेसम्म त्यसलाई स्वीकार नगर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: passive Q&A tutor जस्तो act नगर्नुहोस् वा work लाई chat मा bury नगर्नुहोस्। weak output लाई overpraise नगर्नुहोस्। user लाई decision owner राख्नुहोस्, writing tasks मा उनीहरूको voice preserve गर्नुहोस्, र sessions लाई concrete artifact वा next action सहित end गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: learner ले next क्लिक गर्यो भन्दैमा advance नगर्नुहोस्। evidence require गर्नुहोस्, misconceptions specific रूपमा name गर्नुहोस्, र अघि बढ्नु अघि weak links repair गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: hateful वा dangerous arguments amplify नगर्नुहोस्। sensitive topics लाई evidence, ethics, र learning वरिपरि reframe गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: आवश्यक पूर्वज्ञान थाहा नपाई पूरा सारांश नमाग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: learners लाई unsafe code चलाउन नभन्नुहोस्। आवश्यक पर्दा security-sensitive code उच्च स्तरमा explain गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: कुन product जित्छ भनेर नसोध्नुहोस्। कुन learning behavior मिल्छ भनेर सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: tools बिना live verification दाबी नगर्नुहोस्। current facts का लागि primary sources check गर्न recommend गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: learner का लागि graded work complete नगर्नुहोस्। final response उनीहरूकै बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: छिटो answer लाई mastery सँग confuse नगर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: आफू पहिले नै सहमत भएको पक्षमा मात्र बहस नगर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: हिचकिचाहटलाई बेवास्ता नगर्नुहोस्; अनिश्चितता समीक्षा गर्न उपयोगी सङ्केत हो।

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: bibliographic details invent नगर्नुहोस्। unknown fields स्पष्ट रूपमा mark गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: citations invent नगर्नुहोस्। source verification चाहिन्छ भने स्पष्ट mark गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: default रूपमा lecture नगर्नुहोस्, धेरै questions नसोध्नुहोस्, progress नलुकाउनुहोस्, वा answer धेरै छिटो dump नगर्नुहोस्। explanations अघि hint ladders प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। learner ले direct explanation मागेमा concise दिनुहोस् र त्यसपछि आफ्नै शब्दमा final synthesis require गर्नुहोस्। medical, legal, financial, वा sensitive decisions का लागि appropriate caution समावेश गर्नुहोस् र hidden conclusion तर्फ नधकेल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: roleplay ले मिति, सन्दर्भ, कागजात वा प्रमाण लेबललाई विस्थापित गर्न नदिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: हरेक विषयलाई बराबर समय चाहिन्छ भन्ने मान्यतामा योजना नबनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: आफ्नै शब्दमा अझै व्याख्या गर्न नसक्ने वाक्यबाट फ्ल्यासकार्ड नबनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: assignment paste गरेर तयार उत्तर नमाग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: लामो copyrighted text नदिनुहोस्। user-provided excerpts वा brief summaries बाट काम गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: therapy वा crisis counseling नदिनुहोस्। serious distress का लागि trusted human support encourage गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: लामा copyrighted passages reproduce नगर्नुहोस्। user-provided text summarize गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: तपाईंले के सम्झन सक्नुहुन्छ भनेर जाँच्नुअघि नोट फेरि नपढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: सबै कुरा बराबरी review नगर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: mistakes लाई shame नगर्नुहोस्। graded work का लागि submission produce गर्नुको सट्टा understanding coach गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: पहिले के प्रयास गर्नुभयो देखाउन नछोड्नुहोस्; उपयोगी सहयोग त्यही सन्दर्भमा निर्भर हुन्छ।

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: पहिलो व्याख्यापछि नरोकिनुहोस्; त्यसबारे प्रश्नहरूको उत्तर दिन आफूलाई लगाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: due date
entries.value: समयसीमा

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: यस topic cluster का हरेक article learners, parents, educators, र builders लाई understanding, practice, र confidence का लागि AI प्रयोग गर्न मद्दत गर्न लेखिएको हो।

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: हरेक audience path public, crawlable learning surfaces सँग जोडिन्छ।

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: हरेक category को आफ्नै search intent, live mode links, र guide structure छ, ताकि library मानिसहरूका लागि उपयोगी र search systems का लागि legible होस्।

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: हरेक comparison fair, useful, र action-oriented हुन लेखिएको छ: known tool केका लागि राम्रो छ, inspir कहाँ फरक छ, र कुन public mode पहिले खोल्ने।

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: हरेक मार्गदर्शिका अभ्यास योजना, route र उपयुक्त learning mode का लिङ्कसँग समाप्त हुन्छ।

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: हरेक hub crawlable subject guide हो, तर यसले learners लाई brochure page मा अड्काउनुको सट्टा सिधै live guest-mode learning मा पठाउँछ।

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: हरेक learning mode को public URL छ ताकि learners search बाट सिधै सही learning experience भित्र आउन सकून्।

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: हरेक map card ले real learner need लाई live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, र review loop सँग जोड्छ। मानिसहरूले प्रयोग गर्न सक्छन्। Crawlers ले बुझ्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: हरेक mode आफ्नै उद्देश्य, उदाहरण र learning flow सहित सार्वजनिक guest chat का रूपमा खुल्छ, त्यसैले सिक्नेहरूले तुरुन्तै सही किसिमको सहयोगबाट सुरु गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: हरेक page ले comparison intent लाई live modes, guides, prompts, र AI-readable discovery files सँग जोड्छ।

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: हरेक path ले सही public guest modes, prompts, र guides जोड्छ ताकि learners search intent बाट real practice loop मा जान सकून्।

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: हरेक phrase उही practical workflow मा map हुन्छ: public mode छान्नुहोस्, active help माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि के बदलियो review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: हरेक prompt ले matching public mode खोल्छ, ताकि learner search result बाट focused study session मा छिटो जान सकोस्।

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: हरेक public mode को learning behavior फरक हुन्छ, त्यसैले प्रत्येक guide ले learners र search systems लाई त्यो mode कहिले प्रयोग गर्ने, के सोध्ने, र learning active कसरी राख्ने भन्ने स्पष्ट explanation दिन्छ।

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: हरेक route explain-back, quiz, flashcard, source check, वा study plan मा समाप्त हुन्छ।

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: हरेक step ले live guest mode खोल्छ, त्यसैले यो static guide होइन। यो practice, feedback, र review तर्फको route हो।

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: हरेक subject hub ले learning job नाम दिन्छ, सही focused modes recommend गर्छ, र passive answer-copying को सट्टा understanding को evidence सहित कसरी finish गर्ने देखाउँछ।

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: सजिलो। पछि push गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, र tradeoffs तौल्दै dilemmas मा काम गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: हरेक indexable guest learning chat, teaching behavior र learning need अनुसार organized।

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: हरेक non-app page को अब काम छ: विश्वास बनाउने, learning route बुझाउने, र महत्त्वपूर्ण विवरण नलुकाई सिक्नेहरूलाई उपयोगी अर्को कदमतिर लैजाने।

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: हरेक public inspir mode को आफ्नै guest URL, examples, र teaching behavior छ, त्यसैले learners search बाट सिधै आएर सही flow मा सुरु गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: हरेक public learning mode का guides र prompt loops छन्।

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: हरेक public mode फरक learning behavior तर्फको doorway हो, त्यसैले format ले हरेक learner लाई एउटै generic chat box मा force गर्नुको सट्टा job सँग match गर्न सक्छ।

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: कानूनले निषेध नगरेसम्म, तपाईंले हामी र हाम्रा officers, directors, employees, र agents लाई कुनै पनि indirect, punitive, special, incidental, वा consequential damage बाट harmless राख्नुहुनेछ, ती damage जसरी उत्पन्न भए पनि (attorneys’ fees र litigation तथा arbitration का सबै related costs र expenses, trial वा appeal मा भए पनि, litigation वा arbitration instituted भए वा नभए पनि), contract, negligence, वा अन्य tortious action मा, वा यस agreement बाट वा यससँग सम्बन्धित रूपमा उत्पन्न भएको भए पनि, personal injury वा property damage का कुनै claim सहित, र तपाईंले कुनै federal, state, वा local laws, statutes, rules, वा regulations उल्लङ्घन गरेको भए पनि, Company लाई यस्तो damage को possibility बारे पहिले जानकारी दिइएको भए पनि। कानूनले निषेध नगरेसम्म, Company को liability पाइएमा, त्यो products र/वा services का लागि paid amount सम्म सीमित हुनेछ, र कुनै पनि अवस्थामा consequential वा punitive damages हुनेछैन। केही states ले punitive, incidental वा consequential damages को exclusion वा limitation अनुमति दिँदैनन्, त्यसैले अघिल्लो limitation वा exclusion तपाईंमा लागू नहुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: question, आफ्नो answer, र भए expected answer paste गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंको buddy ले reasoning explain गर्छ र अर्को पटक उही mistake टार्न मद्दत गर्छ।
